holdings.n: Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class

holdings.infoBox: FRWD is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.46%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 8.07%, Advanced Micro Devices at 7.22%, Lam Research at 6.14%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.80%.

overview.description: The Nomura Transformational Technologies ETF (FRWD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks capital growth by actively managing a narrow portfolio of global technology companies. Stock selection combines secular trend analysis and bottom-up fundamental research. FRWD was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Nomura.
